title: [codereview-2] pragma portability in hal.c
description: Review pass 2 (portability/edge cases): Confirmed guards use project-standard __clang__ + __GNUC__ pattern. Edge case: non-GCC/non-clang compiler (e.g. IAR in some Zephyr ports) would skip pragma (correct, no error). No breakage to existing GCC suppression. Minor finding: duplicate pop logic could be refactored but P3 opinion only. Linked to project-LICHEN-3wmt
